intro: Schuurmansia vidalii is a plant species native to West Africa, known for its medicinal properties and traditional use in folk medicine. The health benefits of Schuurmansia vidalii include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been reported to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Schuurmansia vidalii include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Schuurmansia vidalii is commonly prepared as a decoction, infusion, or ointment, with the latter being used to treat skin conditions and wounds.
